an1.21:1.1: "*Bhikkhus*, I see no other single thing that, when undeveloped, is so unworkable as this — the mind [*citta*].
an1.21:1.2: The mind [*citta*], *bhikkhus*, when undeveloped, is unworkable."
an1.22:1.1: "*Bhikkhus*, I see no other single thing that, when developed, is so workable as this — the mind [*citta*].
an1.22:1.2: The mind [*citta*], *bhikkhus*, when developed, is workable."
an1.23:1.1: "*Bhikkhus*, I see no other single thing that, when undeveloped, leads to such great harm as this — the mind [*citta*].
an1.23:1.2: The mind [*citta*], *bhikkhus*, when undeveloped, leads to great harm."
an1.24:1.1: "*Bhikkhus*, I see no other single thing that, when developed, leads to such great benefit as this — the mind [*citta*].
an1.24:1.2: The mind [*citta*], *bhikkhus*, when developed, leads to great benefit."
an1.25:1.1: "*Bhikkhus*, I see no other single thing that, when undeveloped and not made manifest, leads to such great harm as this — the mind [*citta*].
an1.25:1.2: The mind [*citta*], *bhikkhus*, when undeveloped and not made manifest, leads to great harm."
an1.26:1.1: "*Bhikkhus*, I see no other single thing that, when developed and made manifest, leads to such great benefit as this — the mind [*citta*].
an1.26:1.2: The mind [*citta*], *bhikkhus*, when developed and made manifest, leads to great benefit."
an1.27:1.1: "*Bhikkhus*, I see no other single thing that, when undeveloped and not cultivated, leads to such great harm as this — the mind [*citta*].
an1.27:1.2: The mind [*citta*], *bhikkhus*, when undeveloped and not cultivated, leads to great harm."
an1.28:1.1: "*Bhikkhus*, I see no other single thing that, when developed and cultivated, leads to such great benefit as this — the mind [*citta*].
an1.28:1.2: The mind [*citta*], *bhikkhus*, when developed and cultivated, leads to great benefit."
an1.29:1.1: "*Bhikkhus*, I see no other single thing that, when undeveloped and not cultivated, brings such *dukkha* as this — the mind [*citta*].
an1.29:1.2: The mind [*citta*], *bhikkhus*, when undeveloped and not cultivated, brings *dukkha*."
an1.30:1.1: "*Bhikkhus*, I see no other single thing that, when developed and cultivated, brings such *sukha* as this — the mind [*citta*].
an1.30:1.2: The mind [*citta*], *bhikkhus*, when developed and cultivated, brings *sukha*."
an1.30:1.4: The third chapter, on the unworkable.
